title: Berlin Public Transport Ferries - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin public transport ferries are real BVG transit lines, not tourist cruises.** Most are usable with a valid Berlin public transport ticket for the right fare zone.
**F10 Wannsee to Alt-Kladow is the easiest scenic choice** for most visitors: about 20 minutes across the water, usually hourly, and best as a slower west-Berlin half-day.
**F11 and F12 are practical two-minute crossings** in southeast Berlin. Use them when you are already nearby, not as a central sightseeing detour.
**F21, F23 and F24 are seasonal nature-day ferries.** For 2026, BVG lists F21/F23 from 03 April to 01 November and F24 from 01 May to 04 October, with limited operating days.
**Check tickets and bikes before leaving.** F10 does not use the short-trip fare, bicycles need their own fare unless covered, and carriage depends on space and crew decisions.
